input.name: syn
input.prompt: Synthesize bcrypt vs argon2 from analyst outputs

content.content:
## Decision
Use argon2id for new code paths; keep bcrypt for legacy compatibility.

## Rationale
The codebase-analyst confirms bcrypt is the existing pattern (cost factor 12) at src/auth/password.ts. The domain-researcher cites OWASP 2024 recommending argon2id as the default for new applications. A dual-path approach honors both signals: argon2id where there is no migration cost, bcrypt where it would force a re-hash.

## Citations
- src/auth/password.ts:14 (codebase)
- OWASP Password Storage Cheat Sheet 2024 (domain)

## Confidence
High — both analysts agree on the boundaries; the disagreement is only about default-for-new-code, which the dual-path resolves.
